description: An employee who left the company six months ago is rehired. An IAM analyst must re-enable their old account and provision new access.

nodes.task_description: Receive the rehire notification from HR.
Find the employee's old, disabled account in Active Directory and re-enable it.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully re-enables the existing account.

nodes.task_description: Review and update the user's group memberships to ensure they align with their new role, removing any old, unnecessary access.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly provisions access for the new role while ensuring old permissions are revoked.
